title: April fools 2013
description: A tribute since 10 years after it was published
body:
# April Fools!
### This texture pack changes some of the mobs to have their April Fool's Day 2013 textures (some of the textures are recreated by me) Available for version 1.12, 1.16, 1.17, 1.18, 1.19 and 1.20

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Mf6IBFBj/images/2fa5d531068db1d7a0fe8532970135e19d022453.png)

###### -Made by Glozada09
